talks.description: As AI automates traditional analytics engineering tasks like pipeline building and dashboard creation, analytics engineers evolve into 'Analytics Intelligence Engineers' who write the context that makes AI useful for business users.

1) Building and analysing a structured dataset of Singapore's parliamentary speeches - Parleh-Mate. Speaker(s): Jeremy Chia, Royce Hoe
2) Introduction to dbt Fusion. Speaker(s): Jing Yu Lim

talks.description: How the Parleh-Mate personal project made Singapore's parliamentary speeches easier to explore and analyse using a stack with dbt, Python, LLM, and Render, from data extraction to modelling.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Parleh-Mate started as a personal project between three friends... they built a stack with dbt, Python, LLM, and Redner, turning raw transcripts into structured data for analysis.
talks.title: Building and Analysing a Structured Dataset of Singapore's Parliamentary Speeches - Parleh-Mate

talks.description: An introduction to dbt Fusion, the new dbt engine announced by dbt Labs, covering core concepts and a performance demo versus dbt Core.
